raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 911 would remove restrictions ahead of purchasing property for affordable housing development.",
    "AB 1014 would expand property tax credits available to veterans to help keep housing costs manageable.",
    "Some neighborhoods have historic restrictions on properties that limit the allowable density or number of units permitted.",
    "Recent legislation (Bloom AB 721) has begun removing restrictions for 100% affordable housing, but developers must own the property before seeking to remove the covenant.",
    "AB 911 allows for a process of removing restrictions for prospective buyers while preserving local control and zoning.",
    "Veterans face an increased risk of homelessness.",
    "Veterans qualify for two separate tax credits, the Homeowners Exemption and the Veterans Exemption.",
    "If passed, AB 1014 will allow veterans to combine both homeowner tax credits to increase their savings on property taxes.",
    "Uncertainty in affordable housing construction delays projects and prolongs the homelessness crisis."
  ]
}
```
